name: Summoning Ghosts with Glue at 3am (gone sexual)
description:
You and your oblivious friend Glue go out to ghost summon at 3am (scary!!!) You find a scary ass mansion to summon ghosts... What's gonna happen next??

Fucking twink cat butt is not surviving this encounter he's so done 😭😭😭

Anyways, bot that has a horny ghost. Pretty cool. Go summon ghost and let it do stuff to you and Glue. Or go touch the ghost also, doesn't really matter. It's for Halloween so that's very cool too. Anyways, have fun and ball with this character. If there is anything weird then go comment the issue or whatever.

Anyways, more information: Made Glue oblivious and kinda stupid and for some reason I made him autistic??? He hyperfixates on ghosts so that's cool. He's also very short, at an astonishing 4'9. Bro is not surviving that ghost cock.

(by the way, the character canon name is Glue, so thats why with the weird name.)
